#### OKJo - Gold
Mar 14, 2026 04:09am
<p class="ql-align-center"><br></p><p class="ql-align-center"><img src="data:image/png;base64,"></p><p class="ql-align-center"><br></p><p class="ql-align-center"><strong style="background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); color: rgb(33, 37, 41);"><img src="https://singsnap-cdn.nyc3.digitaloceanspaces.com/message-board/threads/AJ2A/3d9dab2130_C0GX_media.png">ROUND 1: MARCH LUCK!</strong><span style="background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); color: rgb(33, 37, 41);"> sing any song that contains, anywhere in its lyrics, anything to do with the St. Patrick's Day holiday and/or its festivities, OR the word "gold." </span><em style="background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); color: rgb(33, 37, 41);">Please note the keyword to listen for.</em></p><p class="ql-align-center"><br></p><p class="ql-align-center">Listen for "Gold"</p><p class="ql-align-center"><br></p><p class="ql-align-center"><img src="data:image/png;base64,"></p><p class="ql-align-center"><br></p><p class="ql-align-center"><br></p><p><br></p>
